case_title: TOMMY E HARPER VS. FABRIZIO FABIANI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARPER, TOMMY E AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, FABRIZIO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FINISHING TOUCH MULTISERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARPER, TOMMY E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FABIANI, FABRIZIO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FINISHING TOUCH MULTISERVICES $7,408.80 PRINCIPAL, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,544.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
